title: Help with shift scheduling
excerpt:
Hello,

posts.author: csnmtl (CSN)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,
I have looked everywhere and can’t seem to find a solution. My company is migrating to Monday on the Enterprise plan and we need help creating a board (or figure out an integration) that would allow us to create and manage shift schedules for our 250+ employees. We used to use Sling, but they do not have an integration with monday and it seems like their API is broken.

Here are our requirements:

  • Shifts must be open, meaning they can be claimed by employees (who would be ‘Guests’).
  • Once claimed, shifts must be approved by management (which would be ‘Admins’). Ideally they would get in-app notifications or emails to approve them.
  • There can be multiple slots per shift, and multiple positions per shift (ex: 3 slots for floor clerk, 1 slot for manager at the same time)
  • We have more than 50 locations, so employees should only be able to take shifts on their allocated locations (boards they would have access/permission to edit?)
  • Schedule must be recurrent, so Admins don’t have to create new shifts every week.
  • PS: using ‘Forms’ is NOT a viable option for our company.

I can’t believe there are no other company that uses Monday with a similar need.
Any help is more than appreciated. We’re open to hiring an expert to help us build this/these boards.

Thank you in advance.

monday is awesome but I think that it’s not the right tool for shift management as it’s gonna require a pretty advanced setup

posts.author: shruti_gupta (Shruti Gupta)
posts.cookedHtml:
It sounds like your team needs something more specialized than Monday’s default setup. For large-scale shift scheduling, you’ll want automation, role-based permissions, and recurring schedule management.

A workforce tool like Workstatus could be a great fit—it integrates time tracking, shift scheduling, and employee management in one platform. It also helps with employee burnout prevention by balancing workloads across teams.

Here’s how Workstatus can help:

  • Open/claimable shifts with manager approvals.

  • Multi-location access control.

  • Recurring schedules without manual setup.

  • Automated alerts/notifications for shift changes.

  • Built-in time tracking for accountability.
